channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Wheelie bins permanently on pavement, 22nd April
item.description:
Wheelie bins permanently on pavement causing problems with ability to use the footpath as it should be 199 brook Street erith Kent
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 199, Brook Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin and rubbish on ground, 22nd April
item.description:
Overflowing bin, rubbish blown around in The Crescent and Church Avenue. The bin is corner of Church avenue/junction The Crescent . Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on side of Nags Head Pub, corner Scena Way & Camberwell Rd, 22nd April
item.description:
2 months old Offensive language possibly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 242, Camberwell Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking drive and double yellow blips, 22nd April
item.description:
Blocking emergency access driveway as well.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden panels and chair, 22nd April
item.description:
Wooden panels and chair here for 1 week, opposite 4 Swinford Gardens. Please collect. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St James's Crescent, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags dumped outside a house on Well Hall Road and people have pulled them apart and spread rubbish all over the pavement, 22nd April
item.description:
Someone has moved out and left lots of black bags on the pavement outside their house that the bin men did not take today. People have been fighting over the contents and have spread the rubbish all over the pavement. It's an eyesore and a hazard. P

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham High Street, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flu tipping on the corner of Coleman road, 22nd April
item.description:
Dumped construction waste on the corner of Coleman road and Wells Way, near the BT box Also the photo of the perpetrator, who was caught on act but refused to take ownership of the items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Coleman Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin area household wood rubbish, 22nd April
item.description:
We found household rubbish in front of 8 to 21 Creasy Estate .Plz clear it Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Aberdour Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees, 22nd April
item.description:
This road is a tree lined road which is lovely but the branches are now obstructing the road and also the phone lines as they have got too big.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hollingbourne Avenue, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees overhanging pedestrian footpath, 22nd April
item.description:
Pavement obstructed by overgrown trees/shrubs. Forcing pedestrians, wheelchair users and parents with pushchairs onto road. Views restricted by trees/shrubs when forced onto the road. This is a pavement used to access Unicorn primary and is therefore very busy.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Creswell Drive, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manholes sinkinking, 22nd April
item.description:
Two manholes sinking making a lot of noise when driven over bloody annoying at night. This has been reported by different people FOUR times over four months since Dec 2025 FIX IT!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No lights in estate, 22nd April
item.description:
No lights on Gatcomehouse estate
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pytchley Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, 22nd April
item.description:
A large pile of construction waste has been dumped in the communal bin area, including floorboards, timber, furniture and black bags of building debris. This is a fire hazard, blocks access and is not permitted under any circumstances. I do not know if the people responsible are council workers or contractors, but this is illegal fly‑tipping. Please investigate and remove it as soon as possible. I live next to the workers they are flat 28

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Setchell Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Glass, 22nd April
item.description:
Large pieces of broken glass. Please note I have reported this TWICE already

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oldstead Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 22nd April
item.description:
There is broken glass in the road on the roundabout
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A2216, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped in cemetery by houses, 22nd April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped in cemetery by alleyway behind houses.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Browning Close, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike stand loose, 22nd April
item.description:
North east corner of High Holborn & Red Lion Street The bike stand closest to the Legible London map is loose in the ground, if someone locks their bike to it it may be possible for someone to lift the stand out the ground then remove the bike.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, High Holborn, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Random ribbish, 22nd April
item.description:
A large bag of magazines, portfolio folders and other bits if crao have just been dumped.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Reynolds Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Patshull place, 22nd April
item.description:
I have only just noticed this curbstone dislodged

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Patshull Place, Kentish Town, Greater London
